name: 16x20 White Arch Kids' Mirror - Pillowfort™
description: Create a captivating focal point in your kid's room with this Arch Kids' Mirror from Pillowfort™. This wall mirror is designed in an arch shape for a classic look and features a white resin frame adorned with a traditional pattern. Plus, it has two hooks on the back to mount securely on the wall. Install it over the dresser for functional flair.
